title: Chinese Buddhist: Heart Sutra (Xuanzang translation) (4)
description: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Heart Sutra (Xuanzang translation)
introduction: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Heart Sutra (Xuanzang translation)

translation.text: From Heart Sutra (Xuanzang translation): A core text of Chinese Buddhism, transmitted through the great translation period and forming the basis of East Asian Buddhist practice.
